name: This or That
description: Fast-paced couple preference choices to test your compatibility and spark fun debates.

prompts.optionB: Talk when there's something to say

prompts.optionA: Support their dreams no matter what
Know the date of your death
Eat only pizza for a year
prompts.optionB: Eat only broccoli for a year
Be able to instantly learn any skill

prompts.optionA: Be able to talk to animals
prompts.optionB: Be able to understand all languages
Live in a small apartment with your best friends

prompts.optionA: Have unlimited money but no free time
prompts.optionB: Unlimited free time but no money

prompts.optionA: Always know what people are thinking
prompts.optionB: Always know what will happen next

prompts.optionA: Be the best at everything you try
prompts.optionB: Be happy with everything you do

prompts.optionA: Have super strength but be clumsy

prompts.optionB: Be able to fly without wings

prompts.optionA: Be able to walk through walls

prompts.optionA: Be able to survive in space

prompts.optionA: Be able to erase bad memories

Always be aware but sometimes sad

prompts.optionA: Be able to change your appearance at will
prompts.optionB: Be able to change someone else's appearance at will

prompts.optionB: Live in a world without sound

prompts.optionA: Be able to instantly master any skill

Be able to change the color of anything
